headline: Linde Plc (NASDAQ:LIN) Technical Breakout Setup Signals Potential Upside
summary: Linde Plc (LIN) shows a strong technical breakout setup with a ChartMill rating of 7/10 and an exceptional Setup Quality Score of 9/10, indicating a tight consolidation pattern near key resistance.
